LightningComponentBundle.description: Credit transfer application and management wizard.

property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Admin, Student.

property.name: componentIcon
property.label: Component Icon
property.description: Component Icon

property.name: componentIconSize
property.label: Component Icon Size
property.description: Component Icon Size

property.name: componentLabel
property.label: Title
property.description: Displays top-left of the component

property.name: contactFieldApiName
property.label: Contact Field API Name
property.description: The API name of the contact field that is used as a lookup in related object.

property.name: ctAppListFields
property.label: Credit Transfer Application List Fields
property.description: The fields to be displayed in the Credit Transfer Application tables in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: enableClickableRefField
property.label: Enable Clickable Ref Field
property.description: Enable reference e.g., Lookup and Master Detail field as clicklable in the datatable.

property.name: enableNewButton
property.label: Enable New Button
property.description: Enable new button to allow creation of new Credit Transfer Application

property.name: applicationFormFieldSetName
property.label: Credit Transfer Application Form Field Set Name
property.description: The credit transfer application field set API name for application form.

property.name: approvalFormFieldSetName
property.label: Credit Transfer Approval Form Field Set Name
property.description: The credit transfer application field set API name for approval form.

property.name: agreementRpPrimaryField
property.label: Agreement Picker's Primary Field
property.description: Primary field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: agreementRpAdditionalField
property.label: Agreement Picker's Additional field
property.description: Additional field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: agreementUnitRpPrimaryField
property.label: Agreement Unit Picker's Primary Field
property.description: Primary field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: agreementUnitRpAdditionalField
property.label: Agreement Unit Picker's Additional field
property.description: Additional field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: ipeRpPrimaryField
property.label: Program Enrollment Picker's Primary Field
property.description: Primary field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: ipeRpAdditionalField
property.label: Program Enrollment Picker's Additional field
property.description: Additional field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: ipsRpPrimaryField
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Picker's Primary Field
property.description: Primary field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: ipsRpAdditionalField
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Picker's Additional field
property.description: Additional field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Admin, Student.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: ID of the salesforce record for the current object. e.g. {!recordId}

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Current Object API Name
property.description: API Name of the current object

property.name: componentIcon
property.label: Component Icon
property.description: Component Icon

property.name: componentIconSize
property.label: Component Icon Size
property.description: Component Icon Size

property.name: componentLabel
property.label: Title
property.description: Displays top-left of the component

property.name: contactFieldApiName
property.label: Contact Field API Name
property.description: The API name of the contact field that is used as a lookup in related object.

property.name: ctAppListFields
property.label: Credit Transfer Application List Fields
property.description: The fields to be displayed in the Credit Transfer Application tables in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: enableClickableRefField
property.label: Enable Clickable Ref Field
property.description: Enable reference e.g., Lookup and Master Detail field as clicklable in the datatable.

property.name: enableNewButton
property.label: Enable New Button
property.description: Enable new button to allow creation of new Credit Transfer Application

property.name: applicationFormFieldSetName
property.label: Credit Transfer Application Form Field Set Name
property.description: The credit transfer application field set API name for application form.

property.name: approvalFormFieldSetName
property.label: Credit Transfer Approval Form Field Set Name
property.description: The credit transfer application field set API name for approval form.

property.name: agreementRpPrimaryField
property.label: Agreement Picker's Primary Field
property.description: Primary field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: agreementRpAdditionalField
property.label: Agreement Picker's Additional field
property.description: Additional field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: agreementUnitRpPrimaryField
property.label: Agreement Unit Picker's Primary Field
property.description: Primary field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: agreementUnitRpAdditionalField
property.label: Agreement Unit Picker's Additional field
property.description: Additional field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: ipeRpPrimaryField
property.label: Program Enrollment Picker's Primary Field
property.description: Primary field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: ipeRpAdditionalField
property.label: Program Enrollment Picker's Additional field
property.description: Additional field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: ipsRpPrimaryField
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Picker's Primary Field
property.description: Primary field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: ipsRpAdditionalField
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Picker's Additional field
property.description: Additional field to be used for matching and display in the record picker field

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.
